title: [ARCHIVE] Tameable Circuit
description: An Archive of Bonfy's Tameable Circuit
body:
> **An Archival of Bonfy's Tameable Circuit**

**Ever wanted to have a pet circuit?**

Now you can!

1. Craft some Wires with a copper ingot and black wool!
2. Craft a Wire Bread with some Wires and bread.
3. Find a Circuit. (only works on fleeing ones I think)
4. Congrats, you now have your own pet Circuit!

You can:
- Feed it more Wire Bread
- Dye the Hand Collar
- Pet it
- Idk what else (I gen forgot)

**BACKPORT: [Tameable Circuit Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/tameable-circuit-backport)**

**CREDITS: TBS DEVS FOR THE CIRCUIT ASSETS**
